description: Core FABER workflow primitives - issue management, branching, PR lifecycle. Meant to be extended by other workflows.

frame.description: Fetch work item and setup branch

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Automatically reload critical artifacts for session continuity
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-faber-session-manager skill to load session context for work item {work_id} with trigger=phase_start.

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-core-env-switch skill to switch to the test environment.

pre_steps.name: Sync from Codex
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-codex-sync skill to pull project documentation from codex for work item {work_id} with --from-codex direction.

post_steps.name: Commit and Push Changes
post_steps.description: Ensure all frame changes are committed and pushed (which will also create a branch to push to).
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-commit-push skill to commit and push all changes for work item {work_id}.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Frame Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of frame phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-work-issue-comment skill to post a comment on work item {work_id}. Context: Add a comment updating status of the issue as frame phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step.

architect.description: Design and plan - extend this phase in child workflows

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-core-env-switch skill to switch to the test environment.

post_steps.name: Commit and Push Changes
post_steps.description: Ensure all architect changes are committed and pushed
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-commit-push skill to commit and push all changes for work item {work_id}.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Architect Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of architect phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-work-issue-comment skill to post a comment on work item {work_id}. Context: Add a comment updating status of the issue as architect phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step.

build.description: Implementation - extend this phase in child workflows

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-core-env-switch skill to switch to the test environment.

post_steps.name: Create Pull Request
post_steps.description: Create PR for the implementation (skips if PR already exists). Links to issue for auto-close on merge.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-commit-push-pr skill to commit, push, and create a pull request for work item {work_id}. This should link the PR to the issue for auto-close on merge.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Build Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of build phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-work-issue-comment skill to post a comment on work item {work_id}. Context: Add a comment updating status of the issue as build phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step.

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-core-env-switch skill to switch to the test environment.

pre_steps.name: Review PR CI Checks
pre_steps.description: Wait for and review CI/CD pipeline results
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-pr-review skill to review PR {pr_id}. Wait for CI to complete and auto-fix any issues found.

pre_steps.name: Forward Feature Branch to Test
pre_steps.description: Merge the feature branch into the test branch for test deployment. The PR remains open targeting main.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-branch-forward skill to merge the feature branch into the test branch. Create the test branch from main if it doesn't exist. Push the result.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Evaluate Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of evaluate phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-work-issue-comment skill to post a comment on work item {work_id}. Context: Add a comment updating status of the issue as evaluate phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step.

pre_steps.name: Set Environment to Production
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to production to use appropriate .env variables for release.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-core-env-switch skill to switch to the prod environment.

pre_steps.name: Create Pull Request for Release
pre_steps.description: Create PR for release to production environment.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-commit-push-pr skill to commit, push, and create a pull request for work item {work_id} targeting the production release.

pre_steps.name: Merge PR to Main Branch
pre_steps.description: Merge the pull request to the main branch.
pre_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-repo-pr-merge skill to merge PR {pr_id} with squash strategy. Delete the source branch after merge.

post_steps.name: Sync to Codex (Production)
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-codex-sync skill to push project documentation to codex for work item {work_id} with --to-codex direction.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Release Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of release phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: Use the fractary-work-issue-comment skill to post a comment on work item {work_id}. Context: Add a comment updating status of the issue as release phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step. Please also confirm the status of the Codex Sync step and list the files that were updated.

autonomy.description: Pauses before release for approval - recommended for production

always_load.description: Current workflow state file - essential for continuation

conditional_load.description: Workflow execution protocol - defines how to execute steps. Only needed when resuming a paused workflow.

conditional_load.command: Use the fractary-work-issue-fetch skill to fetch issue details for work item {work_id}.
